hero.title: Frontend Developer, web enthusiast.
hero.desc: I’m Patryk, a Frontend Developer based in Warsaw, Poland, specialising in creating PWA apps, client-side code optimisations, projects support & improvements, and so on. I enjoy creating things that help others to achieve their goals. Feel free to look on my portfolio and reach out if you would be interested in connecting.
hero.subtitle: Follow me

db64-be46b8r8b54e3f.title: TrainingPeaks - Sport Monitoring
db64-be46b8r8b54e3f.desc: Monitoring for personal trainings. Contains 3 main resources - plans, day feel and trainings. Every section is customizable, and its possible to simply drag-n-drop some training from one day to another, or get a weekly statistics.

dbf0-beqr56b8r8brbe5l.title: OnlineStats.info - Tracking Service
dbf0-beqr56b8r8brbe5l.desc: Startup service for monitoring your own or your kids online status in Telegram Messenger. Works with JWT Auth, bizcharts charts, final-form for forms. Also has implemented i18n locales and dark theme.

dbf0-beqr0b890eq9r8b98.title: Music App Project
dbf0-beqr0b890eq9r8b98.desc: ReactJS & Redux Music player. Contains usable mobile version, localStorage cache. Works with AudioSession Api, so browser features (like hotkey buttons Next/Prev, album preview) is working right.

fbd07wavab0987erab709adb.title: AnyDo Clone ReactJs
fbd07wavab0987erab709adb.desc: Anydo-like To-do list. Functional: all CRUD operations (add, update, read or delete any task), sort by tags, JWT Auth. Also contains mobile verison with Safari viewport and other improvements.

fadb0978a8f90b7986da0968.title: Twitter ReactTs Project
fadb0978a8f90b7986da0968.desc: Clone of Twitter. Currently works: final-form validation, tweet posting, routings and  tweets fetching. Created on ReactTS CRA, but currently is used on Vite.

0879fbd9078adfb0a7dfb908.title: Nolk Template
0879fbd9078adfb0a7dfb908.desc: Responsive template. Uses svg animation and simple 3-steps form created on vanilla Js. Also contains beautiful CSS animations and transitions. Task-runner for minify files, etc - Gulp.
